episode.title: The Hippo
episode.context: A male hippo visits a matchmaker, absolutely certain he's a catch. His signature move is explosive poop-spraying via helicopter tail.
episode.art_style: Children's crayon drawing on white paper, thick waxy colorful strokes, simple childlike illustration, bright primary colors, messy and charming

hippo.style: Deep confident male, Southern drawl, zero self-awareness, gym bro energy. Loud and proud.

matchmaker.style: Calm professional male, dry deadpan humor, therapist energy. Increasingly disturbed but composed.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: So, what do you bring to a relationship?
scenes.image_prompt: A cozy office with a big wooden desk, a small owl wearing glasses and a jacket sitting behind it, a huge round hippo squeezed into a tiny chair across the desk, arms crossed confidently.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Everything. I'm three tons. I'm territorial. I own a whole stretch of river. Prime real estate.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a big proud hippo wearing a gold chain and tiny polo shirt, one hand gesturing wide, huge grin, sitting in a chair that's way too small.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: Great. And what's your approach when you see someone you like?
scenes.image_prompt: A small owl with reading glasses holding a pen over a notepad, looking attentive, bookshelves behind him.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: OK so. I turn around. I lift my tail. And I spin it. Like a helicopter blade.
scenes.image_prompt: A big excited hippo standing up from his chair, waving his hands demonstrating spinning motion, the little owl in background looks alarmed.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: A helicopter blade?
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a worried owl face, one eyebrow raised, pen frozen in the air, glasses crooked.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Yeah, real fast. Maximum RPM. And while I'm spinning — I spray. Everywhere. Full three-sixty coverage. She will be COVERED.
scenes.image_prompt: A huge hippo making an explosion gesture with both hands spread wide, big grin, papers flying everywhere, the tiny owl leaning way back in his chair.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: Covered in —
scenes.image_prompt: The owl slowly putting down his pen, staring forward with huge wide eyes, blank expression.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: My love.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo pressing both hands to his chest with eyes closed and a sweet smile, a big heart floating above his head, warm golden scribbles around him.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: That's not love, sir. That's feces.
scenes.image_prompt: The owl pinching his nose with one wing, eyes squeezed shut, notepad with a big scribbled X on it.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: It's a DISPLAY. It shows her what I've been eating. It says look at my diet, look at my territory, look at my output. It's basically a resume.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo counting on his fingers passionately, leaning over the desk, the tiny chair cracking underneath him, office supplies scattered.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: A resume made of —
scenes.image_prompt: The owl with mouth open and one wing raised giving up mid-gesture, glasses on the desk, looking defeated.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Made of ME. Raw. Unfiltered. Authentic.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo pounding his chest like a superhero, standing tall with head near the ceiling, a 'BELIEVE' poster on the wall.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: Have you considered... flowers?
scenes.image_prompt: The owl gently holding up a flower with a hopeful little smile, a small vase of colorful flowers on his desk.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Flowers? FLOWERS? I'm not a flamingo. I'm a three-ton apex river beast. When I show up, things get wet and things get real. That's my brand.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo slamming both hands on the desk which is cracking in half, coffee mug flying, the owl pressed flat against his chair in shock.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: And how do the ladies respond to this... brand?
scenes.image_prompt: The owl resting his chin on his wing, elbow on desk, looking exhausted, tie loosened, papers everywhere.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Mixed reviews. But I think that's because they haven't experienced the full spray radius. I've been working on my distance.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo sitting with one hand on chin looking thoughtful and analytical, the chair bending under him.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: I'm sorry, your distance?
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of the owl's face with huge shocked eyes and beak slightly open.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: Used to be six feet. Now I can hit twelve. Easy. On a good day — fifteen.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo holding his hands far apart proudly like a fisherman showing a big catch, big satisfied smile, numbers '6' crossed out and '15!!' written above.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: I need you to stop improving at this.
scenes.image_prompt: The owl standing up with both wings flat on the desk, leaning forward with a dead serious face.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: You sound just like my last matchmaker. Before I sprayed her office.
scenes.image_prompt: The hippo gazing off to the side wistfully with a dreamy expression, the owl in background looking around at the walls in panic.

scenes.speaker: matchmaker
scenes.text: Is that why the walls are —
scenes.image_prompt: Wide shot of the office from behind, the owl pointing at a big brown splatter on the wall, the hippo looking away innocently whistling.

scenes.speaker: hippo
scenes.text: That was here when I got here.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of the hippo's face completely deadpan, looking straight at viewer with zero guilt, one eyebrow raised.
